steps.title: Read the comparison visually
steps.content: The underlined phrase compares columns to ancient trees in a petrified forest. That simile helps readers picture the columns' height, thinness, and upright shape within the ruins.

steps.title: Reject literal misreadings
steps.content: A treats the forest image as a real hope, which the narrator never expresses. C invents a specific date for the ruins. D claims the narrator is showing historical study, but the phrase describes appearance.

steps.title: Name the descriptive function
steps.content: The phrase presents an image that illustrates what one part of the ruins looks like. The answer is B.
